issues.description: FlipLife is correct for adding from Life cards to hand, but the DSL structure is wrong. The card says 'You may' — this should be optional/conditional, not a mandatory action before the power boost.

The two effects in the DSL appear to be unrelated. The first effect (OnAttack with FlipLife + PowerBoost) is correct structurally, but the second effect (Trigger with TrashFromHand + PlaySelf) has no basis in the card text and should be removed entirely.
Second trigger block (Trigger + TrashFromHand + PlaySelf) does not match card text. This entire effect should be deleted.
